prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 大连海事大学为211 工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年约第113名，近年排名在99–113区间波动，整体层次稳定，属中上游211院校；该校近年声誉评价平稳，未见明 显负面舆情或投档断档记录；抖音综合热度排名第50位，评价为"较热"，短视频曝光量处于211院校中等水平，未出现异常报考信号；以交通运输工程、船舶与 海洋工程为特色。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等 专业社会热度持续高热推荐，与该校招生专业高度重合，可能吸引更多考生报考；四川省2026年高考总报名约53.5万人，较2025年约46.3万人增长约15.6%，物理类考生估算约32. 9万人（较2025年28.5万增约15.6%），考生规模扩大加剧竞争；该校位于辽宁大连，距四川较远，属跨省招生。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年新高考分组投档后位次大幅后移的基准、2026年物理类考生规模显著增加（约+15.6%）、招生计划仅微扩0.94%以及计算机/电子信息等热门专业对报考的吸引 作用，预计2026年再选不限组最低位次在2025年35928名基础上继续小幅后移；预测最低位次约36181名，区间35681–36681名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science (physics category) was approximately 20900 → 22193 → 23113 → 35928. In 2025, due to Sichuan's first new college entrance examination implementing "Physics + Chemistry" and "Physics + No Restriction" group filing, the minimum ranking for the no-restriction group significantly dropped to 35928, about 12800 places lower than 2024, reflecting the significant impact of subject combinations on admission rankings under the new exam model. The university's enrollment plan for science (physics category) in Sichuan was 102 in 2022, 104 in 2023, 102 in 2024, 106 in 2025, and 107 in 2026, showing a slight expansion trend. In 2026, it increased by 1 compared to 2025, an expansion of about 0.94%, which has a weak mitigating effect on competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Dalian Maritime University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university. Its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings is approximately 113th in 2026, fluctuating between 99 and 113 in recent years, indicating a stable overall level as a mid-to-upper tier 211 university. The university's reputation has been stable in recent years, with no obvious negative public opinion or filing gaps. Its comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking is 50th, rated as "relatively hot," with short video exposure at a medium level among 211 universities, showing no abnormal application signals. It is characterized by transportation engineering and ship and ocean engineering.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as computer science, electronic information/communication, electrical engineering and automation, etc., continue to be highly recommended due to social popularity, and they highly overlap with the university's enrollment majors, potentially attracting more applicants. In 2026, the total number of college entrance exam takers in Sichuan is about 535,000, an increase of about 15.6% from about 463,000 in 2025. The estimated number of physics category takers is about 329,000 (an increase of about 15.6% from 285,000 in 2025), intensifying competition due to the larger candidate pool. The university is located in Dalian, Liaoning, which is relatively far from Sichuan, making it a cross-provincial enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the significant drop in rankings after the new exam group filing in 2025, the substantial increase in physics category candidates in 2026 (about +15.6%), the minimal expansion of enrollment plan by only 0.94%, and the attraction of popular majors like computer science and electronic information, it is expected that the minimum ranking for the no-restriction group in 2026 will continue to drop slightly from the 2025 level of 35928. The predicted minimum ranking is about 36181, with a range of 35681 to 36681.

If your ranking is near the lower limit (>36681), it is recommended to mainly apply for Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.
